name: Recipefork Recipe Story Editor
description: Expandable optional rich-text story editor for recipe narratives, family context, and cooking notes. Mirrors Recipefork's optional story flow with toolbar and sanitization-aware output expectations.

expandable.description: Collapsed optional section that expands into a lightweight rich-text editor with formatting toolbar.

slots.toolbar: Bold, italic, heading, list, ordered list, link actions

visual_brief: A dashed-border card with an optional badge and a collapsible header labeled as the recipe story. When expanded, it reveals a compact formatting toolbar and a narrative editing surface for recipe origin stories, memories, and serving notes.
